title: USGS Earthquake Hazards Program
description: A USGS source card for earthquake monitoring, maps, preparedness, and seismic science.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS earthquake resources explain real-time monitoring, earthquake maps, fault systems, seismic waves, aftershocks, and how scientists estimate risk from geologic evidence.
Use this source for older students reading maps, comparing data displays, tracing cause and effect, and connecting Earth science with community preparedness.
USGS materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some linked maps, photographs, or partner media may have separate credit or rights requirements.
